heading: Membership
label: 20303 Membership
text: The corporation may have not more than 50 regular members.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2030336:4203 (words before 1st comma).(words before 1st comma), .Apr. 17, 1916, ch. 77, § 339 Stat. 51The words “may have not more than” are substituted for “shall consist of not more than” for clarity and consistency.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2030336:4203 (words before 1st comma).(words before 1st comma), .Apr. 17, 1916, ch. 77, § 339 Stat. 51The words “may have not more than” are substituted for “shall consist of not more than” for clarity and consistency.
